overall.description: First-person exploration of a gothic-style common room with stone architecture, large arched windows with blue glass, Victorian furniture, and skeleton displays. The player character walks through the dimly lit space, passing NPCs in robes, and transitions through a grand hall into a corridor leading to a dormitory.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic common room with skeleton exhibits and large arched windows

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the common room, observing the skeleton displays and Victorian furniture

entered.detail: large glass display case containing an animal skeleton with horns
tall gothic window with blue-green stained glass emitting ethereal light
Victorian-style sofa with deep green upholstery and button tufting
tall dark wooden cabinet with books and artifacts
circular wooden dining table with chairs
small animal skeleton on a wooden pedestal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a grand gothic common room with high stone ceilings and large arched windows glowing with blue light. The camera moves past a large glass case containing an animal skeleton and various pieces of Victorian furniture including a green tufted sofa and dark wood cabinets. The space is empty of people, creating a quiet, museum-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room seating area with students

events.description: two students in black robes come into view standing near a harp

agents.ego_description: walking past groups of students and seating areas in the common room

notable_agents.action: two students in black robes standing and conversing near a harp
student sitting in a leather armchair reading a book

entered.detail: large wooden harp with curved frame
tufted leather reading chair
low wooden table with books and items
light-colored upholstered sofa

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a more populated area of the common room where students in dark robes are gathered. A large harp stands near two conversing students, while another student reads in a leather armchair. The blue light from the arched windows continues to illuminate the space as the camera passes by various seating arrangements.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with tapestries and statues

events.description: passes a tall grandfather clock and enters a larger hall with wall-mounted statues
turns toward a corridor entrance at the far end of the hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall toward the corridor entrance, passing by a seated student

notable_agents.action: student sitting on a sofa in the distance near the wall tapestry

entered.detail: tall dark wooden grandfather clock with ornate face
large woven tapestry depicting figures hanging on the stone wall
recessed wall niche containing a stone statue of a robed figure
dark upholstered sofa against the wall
arched doorway leading to a narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a grand hall featuring a prominent grandfather clock and large wall tapestries depicting figures in niches. The camera moves past ornate rugs and dark sofas, turning toward an arched corridor entrance at the far end. A single student sits in the distance, maintaining the quiet atmosphere of the space.

events.description: enters a narrow corridor with arched brick ceiling and illuminated glass skylights

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor toward a door at the far end

entered.detail: brick vaulted ceiling with gothic arch patterns
elongated glass skylight panels emitting green-blue light
ornate runner carpet with geometric patterns covering the floor
heavy wooden door with metal scrollwork and glass panels

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, enclosed corridor with a high vaulted brick ceiling and glowing glass skylights that cast a greenish hue. The walls are lined with sconces and the floor is covered with a patterned carpet. The camera moves steadily toward an ornate wooden door at the far end of the hallway.

events.description: opens the door and enters a bedroom area with canopy beds
slows and stops near the canopy bed

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory and approaching the canopy bed

entered.detail: four-poster bed with dark wood frame and green draped canopy
ornate golden birdcage on a stand
heavy green fabric curtains on the bed
stone archway leading to deeper parts of the dormitory

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the ornate door into a dormitory room featuring a four-poster canopy bed with green drapes. A decorative birdcage stands nearby, and stone arches frame the background. The movement slows as the camera approaches the bed, ending the exploration sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gothic common room that gradually transitions into a private dormitory. It begins in a quiet, museum-like space with high stone ceilings and blue-lit arched windows, moving past animal skeletons and Victorian furniture before entering a more populated area where students in dark robes gather near a large harp. The scene then expands into a grand hall featuring a prominent grandfather clock and wall tapestries, shifting its trajectory toward a distant arched entrance. As the camera passes through this threshold, the environment narrows into an enclosed brick corridor illuminated by greenish skylights and wall sconces. Finally, the movement leads through an ornate wooden door into a dormitory room, slowing as it approaches a four-poster canopy bed with green drapes.
